sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_datetime (id UInt32, event_time DateTime64(3));
UPDATE test_datetime SET event_time = parseDateTime64InJodaSyntax('2023-11-01T08:00:00.000+01:00', 'Europe/Berlin') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_time FROM test_datetime WHERE event_time > parseDateTime64InJodaSyntax('2023-09-01T00:00:00.000Z', 'UTC');
SELECT id, event_time FROM test_datetime WHERE event_time BETWEEN parseDateTime64InJodaSyntax('2023-10-01T00:00:00.000Z', 'UTC') AND parseDateTime64InJodaSyntax('2023-10-31T23:59:59.999Z', 'UTC');
